1: Simoore Al-Faatiha (Uddituɗe) — simoore aranere Alqur'aana, aayeeje 7 Makkiyankoore, njanngiraande e kala juulde. Doosɗe gomɗinal: mantooje, ndewgu, e ɗaɓɓugol feewnude.
2: Simoore Al-Baqara (Nagge) — simoore ɓurnde juutde Alqur'aana, aayeeje 286, Madaniyankoore; gomɗinal, sar'iyaaji, daartol Aadama, e Aaya-l-Kursiyyi.
3: Simoore Aali-Imraan (Galle Imraana) — aayeeje 200 Madaniyankoore, ko faati e asli Imraana, jibinaande Iisaa e Maryama, e hare Uhuda.
4: Simoore An-Nisaa'i (Rewɓe) — aayeeje 176 Madaniyankoore, sar'iyaaji desal, ndoneeki, hakkunde rewɓe, alyatiimeeɓe e nunɗal renndo.
5: Simoore Al-Maa'ida (Njooral) — aayeeje 120 Madaniyankoore, sar'iyaaji ñaametee, ahadi e Naasaara'en, e taalibaaɓe Iisaa.
6: Simoore Al-An'aam (Jawdi) — aayeeje 165 Makkiyankoore, rewgol e shirku njooɗni baɗte wootoori Alla e tagoore.
7: Simoore Al-A'raaf (Toowɗi) — aayeeje 206 Makkiyankoore, daartol Aadama, Nuuhu, Huudi, Saalihu, Luuta, Shu'aybi e Muusaa.
8: Simoore Al-Anfaal (Konu Ɓe Hoccidi) — aayeeje 75 Madaniyankoore, ko faati e hare Badri, sar'iyaaji hare e pecgol konuuji.
9: Simoore At-Tawba (Tuubal) — aayeeje 129 Madaniyankoore, ahaduuji, naafigiyaagal e noddugol jihaadi goonga. Simoore tan aalaa Bismillaahi.
10: Simoore Yuunus — aayeeje 109 Makkiyankoore, ko faati e annabi Yuunus, yurmeende Alla, goonga Alqur'aana e jertinooje.
11: Simoore Huudi — aayeeje 123 Makkiyankoore, daartol Nuuhu, Huudi, Saalihu, Ibraahiima, Luuta, Shu'aybi e Muusaa jertinooje keeferaaɓe.
12: Simoore Yuusufu — daartol ɓurngol yooɗude Alqur'aana, aayeeje 111 Makkiyankoore, hollirde nguurndam annabi Yuusufu timmude.
13: Simoore Ar-Ra'd (Digooje) — aayeeje 43, mantude Alla e maandeeji tagoore — digooje, marmari, juurɗe, caaji.
14: Simoore Ibraahiima — aayeeje 52 Makkiyankoore, teddingude annabi Ibraahiima, du'aa makko, e hokkugol Makka e yaahuuru makko Alla.
15: Simoore Al-Hijr — aayeeje 99 Makkiyankoore, leñol Al-Hijr, tagoore Aadama, e salagol Ibliis sujjude.
16: Simoore An-Nahl (Ñaaki) — aayeeje 128 Makkiyankoore, neemaaji Alla e tagoore — ñaaki, jawdi, caaji, ɓiɓɓe leɗɗe — e golle annaɓaaɓe.
17: Simoore Al-Israa'i (Yaha-Jemma) — aayeeje 111 Makkiyankoore, siftinaade yaha-jemma annabi Muhammadu ummii Makka haa Baytal-Maqdisi.
18: Simoore Al-Kahfi (Fammbo) — aayeeje 110 Makkiyankoore, daartol nayi: wondiiɓe fammbo, gese ɗiɗi, Muusaa e Khidiir, e Dhul-Qarnayni.
19: Simoore Maryama — aayeeje 98 Makkiyankoore, jibinaande miijo Iisaa e Maryama; kadi Zakariyyaa, Yahyaa, Ibraahiima, Muusaa.
20: Simoore Taa-Haa — aayeeje 135 Makkiyankoore, daartol Muusaa fof: noddugol hoore waandu, fedde Fir'awna, e yaltugol.
21: Simoore Al-Anbiyaa'i (Annaɓaaɓe) — aayeeje 112 Makkiyankoore, ƴeewtaade nguurndam e golle annaɓaaɓe 16 e nelal wootoori maɓɓe.
22: Simoore Al-Hajj (Hajju) — aayeeje 78, golle Hajju, tedduɗum Makka e miijagol Ñalnde Darngal.
23: Simoore Al-Mu'minuun (Gomɗinɓe) — aayeeje 118 Makkiyankoore, hollirde ngonkaaji gomɗinɓe malaaɓe e ɗawɗe tagoore neɗɗanke jeeɗiɗi.
24: Simoore An-Nuur (Jalbeendi) — aayeeje 64 Madaniyankoore, laaɓal, jotondiral galle, 'Aaya Jalbeendi', e Alla ko Jalbeendi kammuuli e leyɗe.
25: Simoore Al-Furqaan (Senndoowo) — aayeeje 77 Makkiyankoore, Alqur'aana ko betirgal hakkunde goonga e fenaande, e ngonkaaji jeyaaɓe Ar-Rahmaani.
26: Simoore Ash-Shu'araa'i (Gimɓe) — aayeeje 227 Makkiyankoore, daartol annaɓaaɓe jeeɗiɗi: Muusaa, Ibraahiima, Nuuhu, Huudi, Saalihu, Luuta e Shu'aybi.
27: Simoore An-Naml (Pompombo) — aayeeje 93 Makkiyankoore, annabi Sulaymaana, pompombo, colel hud-hud e Laamɗo-rewɗo Saba'a (Bilqiisa).
28: Simoore Al-Qasas (Pinal) — aayeeje 88 Makkiyankoore, nguurndam Muusaa arannde Misra, donagol Madyana e artugol mo habde Fir'awna.
29: Simoore Al-'Ankabuut (Jollooru) — aayeeje 69, huutoraade suudu jollooru misaal reweteeɓe mehɓe; jarribuyee gomɗinɓe.
30: Simoore Ar-Ruum (Ruumanko'en) — aayeeje 60 Makkiyankoore, jaŋtanoyngol njagol Ruumanko'en e miijagol e maandeeji tagoore.
31: Simoore Luqmaana — aayeeje 34 Makkiyankoore, hollirde waaju hikmaajo Luqmaana haa ɓiyum — waaju jibidinɗo luggiɗngo.
32: Simoore As-Sajda (Sujjude) — aayeeje 30 Makkiyankoore, tagoore, ummital e wahyu, aayaare sujjude.
33: Simoore Al-Ahzaab (Beldi) — aayeeje 73 Madaniyankoore, hare Bulaali, galle annabiijo e peewnugol nguurndam renndo Juulɓe.
34: Simoore Saba'a — aayeeje 54 Makkiyankoore, laamu Saba'a e neemaaji Daawuuda e Sulaymaana.
35: Simoore Faatir (Taguɗo) — aayeeje 45 Makkiyankoore, mantude Alla taguɗo kammuuli e leyɗe, e malaa'ika nulaaɓe.
36: Simoore Yaa-Siin — aayeeje 83 Makkiyankoore, woowaande 'Ɓernde Alqur'aana', ummital, wootoori Alla e wahyu.
37: Simoore As-Saaffaat (Darniiɓe) — aayeeje 182 Makkiyankoore, woondirde malaa'ika darniiɓe, e Nuuhu, Ibraahiima, Muusaa, Haaruuna, Ilyaasa e Yuunus.
38: Simoore Saad — aayeeje 88 Makkiyankoore, Daawuuda, Sulaymaana, Ayyuuba, e salagol Ibliis sujjude yeeso Aadama.
39: Simoore Az-Zumar (Beldi) — aayeeje 75 Makkiyankoore, ndewgu laaɓngu, yurmeende Alla ɓuri taƴagol, e maanɗe Ñalnde Darngal.
40: Simoore Ghaafir (Yaafotooɗo) — aayeeje 85 Makkiyankoore, gomɗinɗo suuɗiiɗo e galle Fir'awna, seedtoo yaafuyee Alla.
41: Simoore Fussilat (Fensitaaɗe) — aayeeje 54 Makkiyankoore, aayeeje Alqur'aana fensitaaɗe laaɓngi, hawrata ko lekki e peewnirki gomɗinɓe.
42: Simoore Ash-Shuuraa (Waaldu) — aayeeje 53 Makkiyankoore, fiɓngu waaldu ngu doosɗo laamu moƴƴu Juulɓe.
43: Simoore Az-Zukhruf (Njooɗndi Kaŋŋe) — aayeeje 89 Makkiyankoore, jertinaade e misaal e jawdi aduna e jaŋto Iisaa.
44: Simoore Ad-Dukhaan (Curki) — aayeeje 59 Makkiyankoore, hollirde curki maandi Ñalnde Darngal e kalkindu Fir'awna.
45: Simoore Al-Jaathiya (Jiccuɓe) — aayeeje 37 Makkiyankoore, jaŋtanoyngol leƴƴi jiccuɗi Ñalnde Darngal.
46: Simoore Al-Ahqaafi (Dow-Gese) — aayeeje 35 Makkiyankoore, kalkindu leñol 'Aada e jinneeji nanngo Alqur'aana.
47: Simoore Muhammadu — aayeeje 38 Madaniyankoore, sar'iyaaji jihaadi e ngonkaaji gomɗinɓe e saa'i hare.
48: Simoore Al-Fat'h (Njaggu) — aayeeje 29 Madaniyankoore, ahaduyee Hudaybiyya hawrata ko njaggu ɓanngu e Qureyshi.
49: Simoore Al-Hujuraat (Jookulli) — aayeeje 18 Madaniyankoore, sar'iyaaji jikku renndo — haala, xarri e musiɗɗaagal.
50: Simoore Qaaf — aayeeje 45 Makkiyankoore, tabintinde goonga ummital e ñaawoore hito galo.
51: Simoore Az-Zaariyaat (Saraaɗe Henndu) — aayeeje 60 Makkiyankoore, fiɓndu ahaduuji gomɗinal e jaŋto Ibraahiima e Muusaa.
52: Simoore At-Tuur (Waandu) — aayeeje 49 Makkiyankoore, woondirde goonga ummital e waandu e defte.
53: Simoore An-Najmu (Hoodere) — aayeeje 62 Makkiyankoore, daartol Mi'raaji annabiijo e potondiral makko e Jibriila.
54: Simoore Al-Qamar (Lewru) — aayeeje 55 Makkiyankoore, fuɗɗortoo aaya feccagol lewru yiinde annabiijo e kalkinduuji leƴƴi ɓennuɗi.
55: Simoore Ar-Rahmaan (Hinnotooɗo) — aayeeje 78, 'Yooɗre Alqur'aana', limtunde neemaaji Alla e 'Neemaaji Joomi mon ko honɗum fennoyton?'
56: Simoore Al-Waaqi'a (Fewjoore) — aayeeje 96 Makkiyankoore, senndude yimɓe peccirle tati Ñalnde Darngal.
57: Simoore Al-Hadiidu (Njamndi) — aayeeje 29 Madaniyankoore, feññinde Alla Aranɗo e Cakkitiiɗo, e nodduye sadaka gomɗinal.
58: Simoore Al-Mujaadala (Debbo Hadanaaɗo) — aayeeje 22 Madaniyankoore, fuɗɗortoo ñaawoore debbo mo Alla ƴettii, e sar'iyaaji galle.
59: Simoore Al-Hashri (Mooɓgol) — aayeeje 24 Madaniyankoore, raddugol leñol Yahuudi'en Banu Nadiir Madiina e inɗe Alla 99.
60: Simoore Al-Mumtahana (Debbo Jarribaaɗo) — aayeeje 13 Madaniyankoore, fiɓndu jotondiral gomɗinɓe fergiraaɓe e ɓesngu maɓɓe keeferaaɓe.
61: Simoore As-Saff (Saff) — aayeeje 14 Madaniyankoore, mantude gomɗinɓe haɓanooɓe gomɗinal saff, e jaŋto Iisaa.
62: Simoore Al-Jumu'a (Aljumaa) — aayeeje 11 Madaniyankoore, waajibinɗo julde Aljumaa e accugol njulaagu so noddaama e julde.
63: Simoore Al-Munaafiquun (Naafigiyaagal) — aayeeje 11 Madaniyankoore, hunnugol añɓe nder — naafigiyaagal — e Madiina.
64: Simoore At-Taghaabun (Horeere Renndiin-de) — aayeeje 18 Madaniyankoore, innirde Ñalnde Darngal 'Ñalnde Horeere Renndiinde'.
65: Simoore At-Talaaq (Seerndugol) — aayeeje 12 Madaniyankoore, fiɓndu laawi seerndugol, saa'i mo reen e jokkondiral nunɗal.
66: Simoore At-Tahriim (Haɗugol) — aayeeje 12 Madaniyankoore, nguurndam galle annabiijo e rewɓe mbaadi gomɗinɓe.
67: Simoore Al-Mulk (Laamu) — aayeeje 30 Makkiyankoore, woowaande 'simoore daɗundi', Joomiiko laamiiɗo kammuuli jeeɗiɗi.
68: Simoore Al-Qalam (Kareemaa) — aayeeje 52 Makkiyankoore, mantude jikkuuji annabiijo moƴƴi, e jaŋto Yuunus e misaal waddiraaɓe ngesa.
69: Simoore Al-Haaqqa (Goonga) — aayeeje 52 Makkiyankoore, hollirde goonga ummital e kalkindu 'Aada e Thamuuda.
70: Simoore Al-Ma'aarij (Ƴeewruuji) — aayeeje 44 Makkiyankoore, ƴeewruuji malaa'ika niwnotooɗo Alla, e Ñalnde Darngal.
71: Simoore Nuuhu — aayeeje 28 Makkiyankoore, noddaandu annabi Nuuhu duuɓi 950 yimɓe makko Alla gooto e diwtandu.
72: Simoore Al-Jinn (Jinneeji) — aayeeje 28 Makkiyankoore, daartol jinneeji nanduɗi Alqur'aana jaɓi gomɗinal.
73: Simoore Al-Muzzammil (Jibiniiɗo) — aayeeje 20 Makkiyankoore, nelal annabi Muhammadu julde jemma e muñal.
74: Simoore Al-Muddaththir (Sutiiɗo) — aayeeje 56 Makkiyankoore, noddude annabiijo caggal wahyu arano jertina yimɓe.
75: Simoore Al-Qiyaama (Ummital) — aayeeje 40 Makkiyankoore, hollirde kewuuji Ñalnde Darngal e haɓere fittaandu saa'i maayde.
76: Simoore Al-Insaani (Neɗɗanke) — aayeeje 31 Madaniyankoore, tagoore neɗɗanke, suɓal heeralal, e mbarjaari Aljanna gomɗinɓe.
77: Simoore Al-Mursalaati (Nuliraaɓe) — aayeeje 50 Makkiyankoore, woondirde keneeli nuliraaɗi e jaŋtanoyngol Ñalnde Darngal.
78: Simoore An-Naba'i (Kabaaru) — aayeeje 40 Makkiyankoore, kabaaru mawɗo — Ñalnde Darngal — e maandeeji tagoore Alla.
79: Simoore An-Naazi'aati (Ɓe Ittiraaɗe) — aayeeje 46 Makkiyankoore, jaŋto malaa'ika ittooɓe fittaandu e townitaare Fir'awna.
80: Simoore 'Abasa (O Ñirɓini) — aayeeje 42 Makkiyankoore, ɗoo Alla feli annabiijo sabu yeddugol gumɗo.
81: Simoore At-Takwiiru (Taggugol) — aayeeje 29 Makkiyankoore, hollirde timmoode aduna e misaaluuji doole — naange taggungo, koode ɓe njanat.
82: Simoore Al-Infitaaru (Pecciingo) — aayeeje 19 Makkiyankoore, hollirde asamaan pecciinde e yanaande yiilaaɗe.
83: Simoore Al-Mutaffifiina (Ɓe Njeñtinoo) — aayeeje 36 Makkiyankoore, fellitde ɓen ɓe njeñtina e njulaagu.
84: Simoore Al-Inshiqaaq (Seekagol) — aayeeje 25 Makkiyankoore, asamaan seekotoongu ɗoftoo Joomi mu'un e kewuuji Ñalnde Darngal.
85: Simoore Al-Buruuj (Galle Koode) — aayeeje 22 Makkiyankoore, daartol sumugol gomɗinɓe e yiite e reende Alla.
86: Simoore At-Taariqu (Jemma Garoowo) — aayeeje 17 Makkiyankoore, ƴeewtaade hoodere feeñoori jemma e tagoore neɗɗanke e ndiyam yaltidam.
87: Simoore Al-A'laa (Toowɗo Fof) — aayeeje 19 Makkiyankoore, mantude innde Alla toowɗo, e gomɗinɓe malaaɓe.
88: Simoore Al-Ghaashiya (Suddoori) — aayeeje 26 Makkiyankoore, innirde kewu suddungo Ñalnde Darngal, e finndinde Aljanna e Yiite.
89: Simoore Al-Fajri (Fajiri) — aayeeje 30 Makkiyankoore, woondirde fajiri e jammaaji sappo, e jaŋto 'Aada, Thamuuda, Fir'awna.
90: Simoore Al-Balad (Dow) — aayeeje 20 Makkiyankoore, woondirde dow tedduɗo Makka e hollirde haɓere nguurndam neɗɗanke.
91: Simoore Ash-Shamsi (Naange) — aayeeje 15 Makkiyankoore, woondirde naange, lewru e asamaan, jaŋto kalkindu Thamuuda.
92: Simoore Al-Layl (Jemma) — aayeeje 21 Makkiyankoore, woondirde jemma e ñalawma, hollirde ceerungal hakkunde sadakaaji e bettuɗo.
93: Simoore Ad-Duhaa (Weetndo) — aayeeje 11 Makkiyankoore, deyƴude annabi Muhammadu 'Joomi maa accaani ma'.
94: Simoore Ash-Sharhi (Uddital) — aayeeje 8 Makkiyankoore, 'Men udditiraaki ɓernde maa?' fewjude laaɓal caggal caɗeele.
95: Simoore At-Tiini (Tiini) — aayeeje 8 Makkiyankoore, woondirde tiini, zaytuuna e Waandu Siinaa, hollirde tedduɗum neɗɗanke.
96: Simoore Al-'Alaqu (Ƴiiƴam Ngostotooɗam) — aayeeje 19 Makkiyankoore: 'Janngu!' — wahyu gadano annabiijo.
97: Simoore Al-Qadri (Teddungal) — aayeeje 5 Makkiyankoore, jemma Teddungal 'ɓuri lebbi 1000' njippinoo Alqur'aana.
98: Simoore Al-Bayyina (Ɓanngal Laaɓngal) — aayeeje 8 Madaniyankoore, feññinde Muhammadu ko ɓanngal laaɓngal annabi Alla.
99: Simoore Az-Zalzala (Dillol) — aayeeje 8 Madaniyankoore, jaŋtanoyngol Ñalnde Darngal nde leydi dillata e feññina sirru mu'un.
100: Simoore Al-'Aadiyaat (Doggooji) — aayeeje 11 Makkiyankoore, woondirde pucci hare doggooji, feli yettugol neɗɗanke.
101: Simoore Al-Qaari'a (Humugol) — aayeeje 11 Makkiyankoore, hollirde kewu humugol Ñalnde Darngal e yimɓe wonooɓe kaari saraaɗi.
102: Simoore At-Takaathur (Ɓeydugol) — aayeeje 8 Makkiyankoore, jertinaade ɓeydugol naɓat yimɓe e yanaande e lamdanirɗe.
103: Simoore Al-'Asri (Saa'i) — aayeeje 3 Makkiyankoore: 'Neɗɗanke fof wonii e perte' — so wonaa ɓen gomɗinɓe, golla moƴƴi e muñii.
104: Simoore Al-Humaza (Yenanoowo) — aayeeje 9 Makkiyankoore, fellitde yennatooɓe yimɓe e mooɓeteeɓe jawdi.
105: Simoore Al-Fiil (Ngabu) — aayeeje 5 Makkiyankoore, Abraha adduɗo konu ngabu liɓde Ka'aba hitaande jibinaande annabiijo.
106: Simoore Quraysh — aayeeje 4 Makkiyankoore, mantude kisal leñol Quraysh e yahaaji dabbunde e ceeɗu.
107: Simoore Al-Maa'uun (Huunde Famaride) — aayeeje 7 Makkiyankoore, fellitde fennatooɓe diina e haɗooɓe waasɓe ballal.
108: Simoore Al-Kawthar (Ɓeydugol) — aayeeje 3, simoore ɓurnde raɓɓiɗde, humpinde annabiijo caangol Aljanna e barki heewɗo.
109: Simoore Al-Kaafiruun (Keeferaaɓe) — aayeeje 6 Makkiyankoore: 'Ko onon diina mon, ko min diina am' — seerndugol e shirku.
110: Simoore An-Nasri (Ballal) — aayeeje 3 Madaniyankoore, njippinaande Ñannguɗe Makka, humpinde garol ballal Alla.
111: Simoore Al-Masad (Ɓoggol) — aayeeje 5 Makkiyankoore, fellitde kaaw annabiijo Abuu Lahab sabu añugol gomɗinal.
112: Simoore Al-Ikhlaasi (Laaɓal) — aayeeje 4 Makkiyankoore, hollirde wootoori Alla: 'Wi'u: Kanko ko Alla Gooto' — hawri e tataɓal Alqur'aana.
113: Simoore Al-Falaqu (Weetndo) — aayeeje 5 Makkiyankoore, moolanaade Joomi weetndo e bone, mbilee e niisgol.
114: Simoore An-Naas (Yimɓe) — aayeeje 6 timminnde Alqur'aana, moolanaade Joomi yimɓe e werjoobe jinneeji e yimɓe.
